schoolName: Simon Fraser University (Stephens Family School of Medicine)
reviewNotes: HELD, NOT PUBLISHABLE: official admissions eligibility page states the MD program 'is unable to accept applications from international applicants' and requires Canadian citizenship or permanent residency (https://www.sfu.ca/medicine/admissions/before-you-apply/general.html, fetched 2026-07-07). This disqualifies the school entirely for the site's India-audience MBBS/medical-abroad use case. Narrative fields below are intentionally left as neutral factual placeholders only (no bestFitFor/programs/whyChoose/faq authored) because writing India-applicant-facing content would require fabricating an eligibility path that does not exist. See the companion .md file for full sourcing and reasoning. Do not publish without a documented product decision to add a non-conversion 'not open to international applicants' informational entry, which is out of scope for the standard template used by this pipeline.
